CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Continued To Apr-07-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Nichole Rodich, #11604.

Erik Peterson, Esq. appeared with petitioner Kimberly Lynde, who was present as Guardian ad litem for Amelie Lynde, who was also present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $54,500.00.
Attorney's Fees - $13,035.74.
Medical Expenses - N/A.
Costs - $497.03.

A net balance of $38,967.23 shall be deposited into a blocked "529" Account for the benefit of Amelie Lynde, to be set up with Merrill Lynch. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-03-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
